scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @printstream/shared && npm run build --workspace @printstream/bridge-runtime && npm run build --workspace @printstream/api && npm run build --workspace @printstream/bridge && npm run build --workspace @printstream/slicer && npm run build --workspace @printstream/web
scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && npm run build --workspace @printstream/shared && npm run build --workspace @printstream/bridge-runtime && concurrently -n shared,api,bridge,web -c magenta,green,yellow,blue "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/api" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/bridge" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/web"
scripts.dev:demo: npm run dev:db && PUBLIC_DEMO_BRIDGE_NAME='PrintStream Demo Bridge' PUBLIC_DEMO_BRIDGE_STATE_FILE=./data/demo-bridge-state.json PUBLIC_DEMO_BRIDGE_LIBRARY_DIR=./data/demo-library npm run demo:bootstrap --workspace @printstream/api && npm run build --workspace @printstream/shared && npm run build --workspace @printstream/bridge-runtime && concurrently -n shared,api,demo-bridge,web -c magenta,green,yellow,blue "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/api" "BRIDGE_NAME='PrintStream Demo Bridge' BRIDGE_STATE_FILE=../../data/demo-bridge-state.json BRIDGE_LIBRARY_DIR=../../data/demo-library npm run dev:demo --workspace @printstream/bridge" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/web"
scripts.dev:demo:parallel: npm run dev:db && PUBLIC_DEMO_BRIDGE_NAME='PrintStream Demo Bridge' PUBLIC_DEMO_BRIDGE_STATE_FILE=./data/demo-bridge-state.json PUBLIC_DEMO_BRIDGE_LIBRARY_DIR=./data/demo-library npm run demo:bootstrap --workspace @printstream/api && npm run build --workspace @printstream/shared && npm run build --workspace @printstream/bridge-runtime && concurrently -n shared,api,bridge,demo-bridge,web -c magenta,green,yellow,cyan,blue "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/api" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/bridge" "BRIDGE_NAME='PrintStream Demo Bridge' BRIDGE_STATE_FILE=../../data/demo-bridge-state.json BRIDGE_LIBRARY_DIR=../../data/demo-library npm run dev:demo --workspace @printstream/bridge" "npm run dev --workspace @printstream/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @printstream/shared && npm run build --workspace @printstream/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @printstream/bridge-runtime && npm run build --workspace @printstream/bridge-runtime && npm run typecheck --workspace @printstream/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @printstream/bridge && npm run typecheck --workspace @printstream/slicer && npm run typecheck --workspace @printstream/web
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run prisma:validate --workspace @printstream/api
